business_context.owner: Shaun and Misty Tucker (husband and wife)
business_context.specialties: Gutter cleaning, repair, installation, gutter guards, fascia/soffit, siding repair, chimney, pressure washing, roof cleaning, wildlife exclusion. Maintenance plans 2-3x per year.
business_context.photo_notes: Website (tuckershomeservices.com) has broken SSL certificate — WebFetch failed. Yelp returned 403 (anti-scraping). Yelp has 5 photos total. Facebook has 265 likes but content not scrapable.

photo_count_from_gbp_estimate: Unknown. Yelp lists 5 photos but blocked from scrape. GBP status unconfirmed. Lean on Nextdoor-focused business with 142 reviews but thin photo footprint.

source_urls.extraction_method: tuckershomeservices.com SSL broken (fetch fails). Yelp returned 403. GBP anti-scraping. No accessible photo URLs.
source_urls.notes: Full Unsplash fallback required. Per Mini's pilot scope, this tests the sparse-photo-source fallback path.

hero.search_for: Technician on a roof cleaning gutters, or before/after gutter work showing clean gutters after debris removal. Shaun/Tucker crew would be ideal if available.

gallery.search_for: Gutter work (clean vs clogged), fascia repair, siding, chimney, roof cleaning, pressure washing.

fallback_strategy.if_insufficient_urls: Use Unsplash contextual search. Specific terms: 'gutter cleaning technician ladder', 'residential gutter work', 'roof cleaning technician', 'fascia soffit repair home exterior'. If Tucker's specific rope-and-harness approach visible (harness system instead of ladder), that's a bonus differentiator. Deliver 7 photos or flag low count.

acceptance_criteria: Hero shows real gutter/exterior work (Unsplash acceptable, technician visible)
Gallery shows exterior home maintenance (not generic home photos)
Rope-and-harness system shots are a bonus
pilot_notes: Mini's 'sparse-photo-source' pilot case. All direct sources blocked (broken SSL, Yelp 403, GBP anti-scraping). Full Unsplash fallback expected.
